Computer Engineer | Hardware | Systems

Building Computing
From First Principles

Final-year Computer Engineering student at IST, Islamabad. I work from transistors upward: HDL, FPGAs, firmware, circuits, and the systems around them.

Featured Work

Engineering Projects

Scroll to explore selected hardware and embedded systems projects.

01

FPGA Signal Processor

High-speed digital signal processing on Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA. Implemented FFT, filtering, and real-time data acquisition.

VerilogVivadoMATLAB
02

STM32 Motor Controller

Closed-loop BLDC motor control system with sensorless commutation and CAN bus communication.

C/C++STM32CubeFreeRTOS
03

IoT Environmental Monitor

Wireless sensor network for air quality monitoring with LoRaWAN connectivity and cloud dashboard.

ESP32LoRaMQTTInfluxDB
04

RISC-V Core Implementation

5-stage pipelined RISC-V processor core with hazard detection and branch prediction.

SystemVerilogRISC-VQuestaSim

Testimonials

What People Say

Feedback from professors, mentors, and colleagues who have worked with me.

“Ahmed consistently demonstrated exceptional problem-solving skills in our FPGA design course. His final project on RISC-V implementation was among the best I've seen.”

SA

Dr. Sarah Ahmed

Professor, IST Islamabad

“Working with Ahmed on the embedded systems project was impressive. His attention to detail and deep understanding of hardware-software integration made all the difference.”

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Have questions? Here are some answers to common inquiries.

I specialize in computer engineering with a focus on embedded systems, FPGA design, and hardware-software integration. My experience spans from low-level RTL design to high-level system architecture.

Still have questions? Feel free to reach out.
